channel.title: Boba on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Boba on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: Lychee Milk Tea Recipe: Easy Boba Tea at Home
item.description: Make lychee milk tea at home with fresh or canned lychee, jasmine green tea, and optional boba pearls. Sweet, floral, and ready in 15 minutes.

item.title: Mango Bubble Tea Recipe (Mango Boba)
item.description: Make mango bubble tea at home with fresh or frozen mango, chewy tapioca pearls, and creamy milk. Includes mango milk tea, mango green tea, and mango matcha variations.

item.title: Boba Recipe (Bubble Tea Recipe): Make It at Home From Scratch
item.description: Complete boba recipe and bubble tea recipe guide — cook tapioca pearls from scratch, make classic milk tea base, and build 8 bubble tea variations at home.

item.title: Taro Milk Tea Recipe (Taro Boba & Taro Bubble Tea Guide)
item.description: Make creamy, purple taro milk tea at home — with or without boba. Covers taro bubble tea, taro boba, taro latte, and Starbucks copycat variations. Full guide with step-by-step instructions.

item.title: Tiger Milk Tea Recipe (Tiger Boba at Home)
item.description: Make tiger milk tea at home — the viral brown sugar boba drink with stunning caramel tiger stripes. Includes dirty tiger version with espresso.
